name: Miller, Lisa
evidence: Listed as Not Employed, Austin 78703, gave $1,000 to Andy Brown (Oct 2025). 'Lisa Miller' is an extremely common name with no employer, occupation, or other distinguishing detail to corroborate a specific individual; could not confirm identity.

name: Calvert for Commissioner Campaign
resolved_employer: Campaign committee for Tommy Calvert, Bexar County Commissioner Precinct 4 (Democrat)
evidence: Not an individual: this is the candidate campaign committee of Tommy Calvert, the long-serving Bexar County (San Antonio) Commissioner for Precinct 4, a Democrat first elected in 2014. San Antonio 78212 address matches Bexar County; a county-official campaign giving $1,000 to fellow county commissioner Jeff Travillion (Travis Co.) is a peer political contribution.

evidence: Jim (James) Schwertner is the CEO/owner of Capitol Land & Livestock in Schwertner, TX (Williamson County, adjacent to the 78641 Leander/Liberty Hill area on record), one of the nation's largest cattle-trading firms (~300,000-400,000 head/yr, ~20,000 acres). Distinctive surname is the family town name. Industry left null because agriculture/livestock is not in the provided taxonomy; identity itself is high confidence. Gave $1,000 to Ann Howard.
